name: fused_add_rmsnorm_h3584
description: Fused Add + RMSNorm with hidden_size=3584 for Qwen2.5-7B. Epsilon is fixed at 1e-6.

residual.description: Residual tensor to be added before normalization.

updated_residual.description: Updated residual, equal to hidden_states + residual before normalization.

reference:
import torch

@torch.no_grad()
def run(hidden_states, residual, weight):
    _, hidden_size = hidden_states.shape
    # Check constants
    assert hidden_size == 3584

    EPS = 1e-6

    # Step 1: updated_residual = hidden_states + residual
    updated_residual = hidden_states.to(torch.float32) + residual.to(torch.float32)
    # Step 2: output = RMSNorm(updated_residual) * weight
    inv_rms = torch.rsqrt(updated_residual.pow(2).mean(dim=-1, keepdim=True) + EPS)
    output = (updated_residual * inv_rms) * weight.to(torch.float32)
    return output.to(hidden_states.dtype), updated_residual.to(residual.dtype)
